scrape.description:
Eivan Properties presents this contemporary 3-bedroom townhouse in Shams Townhouses, a vibrant community by Nshama Properties, located in Town Square Dubai. Designed for modern family living, this home offers a perfect balance of comfort, space, and lifestyle within a dynamic, nature-inspired environment. 

Property Details
* 3 Bedrooms | 4 Bathrooms
* Maid’s room
* Open-plan living & dining
* Built-in wardrobes
* Private garden & balcony
* Covered garage
* Contemporary design
* Ready / off-plan options available

Features & Amenities
* Access to Town Square Park
* 13 km cycling trails & 10 km jogging tracks
* Swimming pools & state-of-the-art gym
* Kids play areas, splash pads & carousel
* Skate park, trampoline park & wave rider
* Outdoor cinema & community events space
* Retail outlets, cafes & restaurants
* Community gardens & picnic areas
* Mosque within the community
* Gated community with 24/7 security

Location Highlights
* Prime location in Town Square Dubai
* Easy access via Al Qudra Road & Emirates Road
* Close to Dubai Miracle Garden & Global Village
* Near reputable schools including Jebel Ali School & Fairgreen International School
* Approx. 25 minutes to Al Maktoum International Airport
* Well-connected to key areas of Dubai

Investment Highlights
* High ROI & capital appreciation potential
* Freehold property
* Golden Visa eligibility
* Flexible 50/50 payment plan & post-handover options
* High rental yield potential
* Ideal for families and investors

This townhouse offers a vibrant community lifestyle with modern design, green surroundings, and family-friendly amenities—making it an excellent choice for both living and investment. 

Your next home is waiting – let our agent guide you!
